prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SHM-ALARMDEVICE-FITH-4PK Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical USA-Made 4-Pack Trip Wire Perimeter Alarm Anti-Intruder Early Warning System Description: This perimeter trip alarm home security device is your first line of proactive defense, alerting you of any nearby movement with a trip wire initiated alert system. This versatile, reusable trip line activated 209 perimeter alarm can be deployed across paths and entry zones, attached to doors, gates, and more.

Use to enhance perimeter security for your private property or restricted area for protection against intruders and trespassers. Standing tall at only 5 inches this trip wire alarm signaling device from ASR Tactical is simple, effective and always reliable. Utilizing a passive triggering mechanism via trip wire, this device is easy to set up and quickly reacts to physical movement, audibly alerting you to physical presence.

Reliable many times over. Use to detect predators before they enter your camp site. Deploy to keep coyotes from livestock. Trip wire is used to rig the perimeter alarms but is not included; we recommend Kevlar trip line. The perimeter trip alarm includes instructions, safety and activator pins, as well as mounting hardware. Solidly constructed from machined aluminum and steel. Made in USA. For outdoor use only, keep away from flammable materials, use with caution. Search Terms: 209 perimeter trip alarm shomer kevlar trip wire home security campsite bear trap private property trespasser burglar booby traps catch intruders prevent trespassers 12 gauge primer large game door gate device Features: - The perimeter alarm is a trip wire activated audible signaling device that can alert you when trespassers are on your property - This versatile trip wire perimeter alarm home security system can be deployed across paths and entry zones, attached to doors and gates, reused many times over - The perimeter trip alarm includes safety and activator pins, and mounting hardware - Color: Black. Weight: 1.3 oz. Solidly constructed from machined aluminum and steel. Made in USA - Warning: For outdoor use only, keep away from flammable materials, use with caution === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 4-Pack Black Trip Wire Perimeter Alarm

anthropic.title_differentiation: USA-Made, Audible Alert System, Reusable Trip Wire Activated, Intruder Detection, Outdoor Security Device
